landing_page.hero_section: Full-screen interactive BackgroundGradientAnimation with centered typography.
landing_page.features_section: Bento Grid (3 columns). Mix of 1x1, 2x1, and 2x2 cards.
landing_page.spacing: Gap-6 to Gap-8 for breathing room.

dashboard.structure: Grid-cols-12. Sidebar (2 cols), Main Content (7 cols), Right Panel (3 cols - Leaderboard/Events).
dashboard.widgets: Card-based with sharp corners or small rounded-md. Glassmorphism headers.

buttons.primary: rounded-md bg-primary text-white font-medium hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-200 shadow-lg shadow-primary/20
buttons.secondary: rounded-md border border-input bg-transparent hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground
buttons.cyber: relative overflow-hidden border border-primary/50 text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,140,255,0.4)] transition-all

cards.base: bg-[#0A0A14]/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/5 hover:border-primary/30 transition-colors duration-300 rounded-lg

inputs.style: bg-[#12121A] border-white/10 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 rounded-md text-white placeholder:text-gray-600

navigation.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#05050F]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5
navigation.sidebar: fixed left-0 h-full bg-[#05050F] border-r border-white/5 w-64 hidden lg:flex flex-col

gamification.badge: hexagon-shape bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-900 to-slate-900 border border-purple-500/30 text-purple-200

visual_enhancers.glow_effects: Use drop-shadow-md for text on dark backgrounds. Use box-shadow for active states.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Subtle linear gradients for card backgrounds (top-left to bottom-right). NO global full-screen gradients except Hero.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid borders with 5-10% opacity for structure. Active elements get 100% opacity borders.
visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlay opacity-5 on the main background to reduce digital banding.

student_focused.alt: Focused coding student in dark environment

mentor_team.alt: Tech team collaborating in modern office

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure all text on #05050F is #94A3B8 or lighter.
accessibility.interactive_states: Focus rings must be Cyan (#00C8FF) for visibility.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Disable BackgroundGradientAnimation if prefers-reduced-motion is true.

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Install 'lucide-react' for icons. Use strictly. No emoji icons.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Configure Tailwind theme to match the 'colors' object precisely.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: For the Video Player, build a custom control bar. Do not use default HTML5 controls.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: For the Code Editor, use 'react-monaco-editor' or 'CodeMirror' tailored to the dark theme.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Implement 'BackgroundGradientAnimation' as the hero background (z-0). Content goes in z-10.
instructions_to_main_agent.7: Use 'Sonner' for all notifications (Success: Neon Green, Error: Red/Orange).
instructions_to_main_agent.8: Dashboard must have a 'Streak Flame' animation in the top right.
instructions_to_main_agent.9: Authentication pages (Login/Signup) should be centered cards on the 'tech_abstract' background.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for text (accessibility).
Do NOT use rounded-xl or higher. Keep it sharp (rounded-md or rounded-sm) for a 'Tech' feel.
Use 'grid' layouts over 'flex' for main page structures.
Ensure the 'Continue Learning' button is the most prominent element on the Dashboard.
